title: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
content: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation.

title: Palestinian journalist describes losing prosthetic eye in Israeli prison

title: Kuwait blames Iran for drone strike, Iran denies responsibility

title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
content: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

title: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission but will Tuchel take notice?
content: Ollie Watkins' response to being dropped by England has been nothing short of emphatic, with two strikes in Bologna adding to his goal against West Ham before the international break.

title: Robertson to leave Liverpool at end of the season
content: Andy Robertson will leave Liverpool at the end of the season when his contract expires in the summer, the club has announced.
